 INFO  Hello, World!
 SUCCESS  Hello, World!
 WARNING  Hello, World!
  ERROR   Errors show the filename and linenumber inside the terminal!
 INFO  Other PrefixPrinters can do that too!
└ (/home/nixos/projects/github/pterm/pterm/_examples/prefix/demo/main.go:26
)
